no-restricted-imports.name: console
no-restricted-imports.message: Please use our custom logger from src/utils/logger instead of direct console calls.

no-restricted-syntax.message: INVARIANT: No snake_case proto fields. Use camelCase (genesisHash). Proto data MUST come from @bufbuild/protobuf codegen — never raw/duck-typed objects.
